environment: clean checkout of the public Quesa repository at the recorded quesa-master-head commit
host compiler and platform dependencies selected from public repository files
public/open QuickDraw 3D compatibility examples or procedural test inputs
no proprietary Apple SDK redistributables committed to this repository

steps: clone or update the public Quesa source repository listed in the artifact record
verify the local checkout commit against the quesa-master-head snapshot record
use public repository metadata and release-history sources to identify supported platforms and dependency assumptions
configure and compile the QuickDraw 3D API reimplementation with public/open dependencies
run a minimal public-safe API or scene smoke test when available
record build commands, compatibility notes, diagnostics, produced outputs, and dependency gaps as public metadata
promote repeatable commands into the Quesa / QuickDraw 3D compatibility packet
public_notes: Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding Quesa as a public QuickDraw 3D API compatibility lane.
